_comment_module_1: The units for the "retryInterval", "moduleTimeout" and "batteryChargeTime" fields are seconds.
_comment_module_2: Entering "-1" in the "moduleTimeout", "batteryChargeTime" and "retryTimeWhenFail" fields indicates "indefinite."
_comment_module_3: The "successCodes" field is an empty list, indicating that all error codes are considered to represent successful execution of this module.
_comment_module_4: The "supportPlatforms" field is an empty list, indicating that this module is not associated with any platforms.
_comment_flow_1: A "moduleUIName" field must be created for each module in the flow, and this name must be unique.
_comment_flow_2: A "gotoModule" field must be created for each module in the flow, and this field must contain a field named "others".

description: this is shell module for grouping other modules, it has no actual execution logic.

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out).

subModules._successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.3: no UDID, device may not under normal mode
_result_description.4: active device failure - reason found FMI
_result_description.5: active device failure - reason wrong sim card
_result_description.6: active device failure - reason need to select carrier
_result_description.7: active device failure - reason demo phone
_result_description.8: active device failure - reason phone issue
_result_description.9: active device failure - reason network issue

subModules._successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.2: no UDID, device may not under normal mode
_result_description.4: This device must be confgured using the Device Enrollment Program
_result_description.5: A cloud configuration is already present on this device

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out).

subModules._successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.3: iOS device, device under recovery mode
_result_description.4: no UDID, device may not under normal mode

input._subModules: A list of sub modules to be executed in this group, the execution order is from top to bottom. The sub module can be any module including Group module, but it should not be the module itself or its upstream modules, otherwise it will cause cyclic call.
input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. Execution will resume after waiting for a UI response message.

codesDefine._comment: will only consider the submodules that have been executed, if all of their execution results are in the defined success codes, then it is considered as group_success, otherwise it is considered as others. If a submodule does not have defined success codes, then any execution result of this submodule will be considered as success for this submodule.

_successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.1460: timeout or reach maximum retry times
